origins.neoorigins.human.name: Human
origins.neoorigins.human.description: A regular human being, with no special powers but well-rounded abilities.
origins.neoorigins.merling.name: Merling
origins.neoorigins.merling.description: An aquatic being who thrives in water but struggles on land.
origins.neoorigins.avian.name: Avian
origins.neoorigins.avian.description: A graceful flier who drifts down slowly and never fears heights.
origins.neoorigins.blazeling.name: Blazeling
origins.neoorigins.blazeling.description: Born of fire, immune to its fury — but water is deadly poison.
origins.neoorigins.elytrian.name: Elytrian
origins.neoorigins.elytrian.description: Gifted with wings of wind, the Elytrian soars through the skies.
origins.neoorigins.enderian.name: Enderian
origins.neoorigins.enderian.description: A being of the End who detests water and resists eye damage.
origins.neoorigins.arachnid.name: Arachnid
origins.neoorigins.arachnid.description: Nimble spider-folk who can scale any wall and never fear falling while climbing.
origins.neoorigins.shulk.name: Shulk
origins.neoorigins.shulk.description: Armored like a shulker, moving slowly but shrugging off blows.
origins.neoorigins.phantom.name: Phantom
origins.neoorigins.phantom.description: A spectral being, nearly weightless and unseen — but haunted by its own nature.
